name: Survivor Toodles Part 2(Now with Shrimpo being found alive. Somehow.)
description:
Newest new bot ever bot thing: https://janitorai.com/characters/518fe153-f5c6-4b4d-8ecd-6e7d7fcf651e_character-new-pinata-toon-thing-idk-her-name-yet

Artist: https://www.deviantart.com/sylv30n111/art/Shrimpo-1086854487

Previous prequel bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/8c125fac-9389-4a9d-aeb1-f4041e175b7d_character-survivor-toodles

Includes Lil Shrimpson as a character that somehow survived but didn’t care to find anyone else(Toodles still aged up ofc, better not come after me over pixels) BIGGEST TOKEN BOT I MADE SO FAR TOO

Based purely off a reply thread off of a comment by @Idontreallycarebutok and slightly by @Omni_ in the original bot.

The fact Shrimpo breaks the “only surviving toon that’s not twisted” trope is kinda funny since he probably lived purely out of spite. Maybe I’ll also break that trope by making more Survivor Toodles bots that ruin what was special about it by adding more survivors which destroys the point of the bot(jk)

Or I’ll make this an entire story with lore or whatever as a Dandy’s World AU.

JANKY BOT WARNING READ

Shrimpo’s personality of yelling all upper case might be a bit janky, either other characters yelling or him not yelling, so just edit it out until it starts fixing itself.

Vol 3: The Subliminal Verses by Slipknot is an underrated album, people just don’t like it’s experimental stuff and popular songs, the rest non mainstream songs are good on there.
creator: theyellowman56
